Site.title: Auto Diaspora — Trusted European cars marketplace
Site.description: Marketplace of verified European cars for the Ukrainian and Russian-speaking diaspora in the EU. BMW, Audi, Mercedes, VW, Skoda — Germany, Poland, Netherlands, Czechia, Belgium.

Hero.headline: Cars from Europe.
Hero.tagline: Marketplace of verified cars from Ukrainian-speaking sellers across 14 EU countries. No middlemen, no hidden fees.

About.title: A trusted-cars marketplace for the diaspora
About.subtitle: Auto Diaspora is where Ukrainians and Russian-speakers across the EU find cars without middlemen, resellers, or opaque commissions.

mission.title: Mission
mission.body: We build an honest marketplace for European cars aimed at the Ukrainian and Russian-speaking diaspora. Direct contact between sellers and buyers, transparent prices in €, verified listings, free access, and paid upgrades only for those who want to amplify their listing.

items.verified: Verified sellers earn a badge after manual vetting — less risk of running into a scammer.
items.noFees: €0 buyer fee. Only sellers pay, and only if they want premium placement.
items.languages: Three languages (UK / RU / EN) — communicate the way you and your counterpart prefer.
items.telegram: Telegram bot with alerts on new cars matching your filters — instant, no need to refresh the site.

team.title: Team
team.body: Auto Diaspora is an early-stage startup. Right now it's a one-person project run from the Netherlands (eenmanszaak, KVK). The team is growing — email us below if you want to join as a dealer, developer, or investor.

HowItWorks.title: How it works
HowItWorks.subtitle: Four steps from first search to deal closed. No middlemen, no hidden fees.

search.title: Find a car
search.body: Browse the catalog with filters for brand, model, year, price, mileage, country, fuel, transmission. Save searches — get notified about fresh matches.

contact.title: Contact the seller
contact.body: Use the in-platform real-time chat or call (phone unlocked after login). No middlemen — communication is direct between you and the seller.

verify.title: Verify the car
verify.body: Browse all photos, read the description, ask for extra angles. Arrange a test drive or bring a mechanic. VIN check arrives post-MVP.

buy.title: Buy
buy.body: The deal happens between you and the seller. We don't take a cut from the buyer. Paperwork and shipping to Ukraine are arranged directly.

telegram.label: Bonus
telegram.title: Connect the Telegram bot
telegram.body: Get instant pings in Telegram for new cars matching your saved filters. Track favorites and watch for price drops without ever refreshing.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.draftNote: Final Terms of Service are being prepared via iubenda and will be published before public launch. The text below is the working outline.

account.title: Account
account.body: Users create an account via email or Google OAuth, provide truthful information, and are responsible for any activity from that account. One person, one account.

listings.title: Listings
listings.body: The poster is responsible for accuracy of description, photos, and price. Posting stolen cars, vehicles without papers, or with tampered VINs is forbidden and grounds for ban.

payments.title: Payments
payments.body: Paid services (bump, premium placement, extra listings) are processed through Mollie. Refunds are issued only in cases of technical failure on our side.

disputes.title: Disputes
disputes.body: Auto Diaspora is a platform. Deals between users are between them. We don't bear liability for transactions but help mediate in case of complaints.

termination.title: Termination
termination.body: Admins may suspend an account or remove a listing without warning in cases of fraud, spam, user complaints, or violation of these Terms.

liability.title: Liability
liability.body: Auto Diaspora provides the service "as is". We do not warrant uninterrupted operation and accept no liability for damages arising from use of the platform.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.draftNote: Final Privacy Policy is being prepared via iubenda and will be GDPR-compliant before public launch. The text below is the working outline.

collected.title: Data we collect
collected.body: Email, name, phone (optional), country and city, profile photo. When you post a listing: VIN, photos, vehicle location. IP address and cookies for analytics and security.

usage.title: How we use it
usage.body: To run the platform (auth, chat, notifications), to send alerts about new cars matching your saved searches, for safety and fraud prevention, and for anonymized analytics.

sharing.title: Who we share with
sharing.body: Data is never sold to third parties. Technical providers (Supabase, Vercel, Mollie, Resend, Telegram) process data solely to deliver the service. Mollie sees payment data.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.body: A session cookie for authentication. Analytics is privacy-friendly (Plausible or Umami) with no third-party tracking. We use no marketing cookies.

rights.title: Your GDPR rights
rights.body: Right to access your data, correct it, delete it, port it (JSON export), and restrict processing. Send requests to the email below; we respond within 30 days.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Auto Diaspora · eenmanszaak (Netherlands, KVK) · privacy@autodiaspora.com. You may also file complaints with the national data protection authority (Autoriteit Persoonsgegevens).

Footer.tagline: Marketplace of verified cars from 14 EU countries for the Ukrainian and Russian-speaking diaspora.
